title: prunus pseudocerasus f. humilis
intro: Prunus pseudocerasus f. humilis, also known as a dwarf Chinese cherry or dwarf wild cherry, is a compact shrub native to East Asia. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which help to prevent infections and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Prunus pseudocerasus f. humilis include reducing fever, alleviating coughs and sore throats, and supporting digestive health. The plant can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as used in dried or fresh form in herbal remedies to harness its medicinal properties.
